thought.text: It seems like the command is still being cancelled. I suspect that the issue might be that the current directory is not empty. I'll try creating the project in a subdirectory called `coffee-shop`.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"security_risk":"MEDIUM","command":"npm create vite@latest coffee-shop -- --template react --no-interactive","timeout":60,"summary":"Create a new React project using Vite in a subdirectory."}
